summary: W1451 refines the W1450 W987 construction by building its W716 boundary-data input from the two raw W907 boundary fields, then feeding the resulting W1450 input to assemble W730, W986, and W987 with projection theorems back to those fields and the carried W717/W984/W950 data. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1451 constructs W987 from two raw boundary fields plus assumed W717/W984/W950 field-data inputs rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1451 raw boundary-field, W717, W984, and W950 construction inputs with real Lean constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement, or replace them with an explicit positive witness.
Before any future product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
